csp.quant_note: The $360 CSP May 29 leads all CSP candidates at 34.98% AROC with 30 DTE — highest annualized yield in the scan. At -0.30 delta the strike sits ~5.2% OTM from $379.90, within Theta-optimal DTE range for accelerated decay. Outperforms the May 29 $355 and Jun 5 $355 equivalents by 360bps+ annualized despite the narrower OTM buffer.

cc.quant_note: The $410 CC May 29 tops the CC group at 22.51% AROC with 30 DTE. Strike sits ~$30 OTM (~7.9% above $379.90), providing solid upside buffer while collecting premium at peak Theta decay velocity. Outperforms the Jun 5 and lower-strike May 29 alternatives on annualized yield despite similar delta profiles.
